Notes:
1. The above options provide only a small sample of the myriad of possibilities. They provide a cross
section of average labor times required for plaster and gypsum board assemblies.
2. Fasteners are screws or blued, ring shank nails for wood framing and screws for metal framing.
3. Accessories are not included in plaster or stucco line items.
